## Steps

1. Read the relevant source files (`index.html`, `script.js`, `styles.css`) to understand current structure
2. Plan the implementation — identify which files need changes
3. Implement the feature following existing patterns and conventions
4. Verify there are no errors in the changed files
5. Append a new session entry to `PROMPT-HISTORY.md` using the template at the top of that file
